title: Kids Water Guns – Assorted Colors Neon Water Pistols for Kids - Extended Range Water Soakers for Summer Play, Perfect for Outdoor Adventures, Bath-Time Excitement, and Party Favors (2)
features: Fun-packed Water Gun Party: Enjoy endless hours of excitement with this neon water guns, perfect for kids and adults alike. Whether it's a pool party, beach day, or family gathering, these easy-to-carry water pistols promise non-stop fun.

Safe & Versatile Water Toys: Designed for kids aged 3-8, these water pistol offer a shooting range of up to 20-25ft. Made from lightweight ABS plastic, they're safe for children and tested for durability. With our CE certified water guns now Say goodbye to battery-powered worries and hello to carefree water play!

Retro Style, Modern Fun: With a cool retro design and vibrant neon colors, these water pistols bring back nostalgic memories while sparking new adventures. Simple to fill and easy to use, they're the ultimate addition to any water play activity, from paddling pools to garden parties.

Perfect for Party Favors: Compact and easy to store, these water guns are ideal for party bags or small gifts. Measuring just 10cm by 8cm, they're a hit at birthday parties, outdoor events, or as stocking stuffers. Let the water gun fun begin!

Encourage Imaginative Play: Dive into a world of imaginative, sensory play with these powerful yet safe water guns. Whether you're hosting a backyard bash or simply beating the heat, these water toys are sure to make a splash. Let your creativity flow with these water blasters!
